title: What Wealth Surrounds Me Right Now
subtitle: A journal prompt set for naming the abundance already present before moving toward the next goal
excerpt: A four-prompt journal set from Day 78 of a 12-week money programme. The prompts move from looking at what wealth is already around you, to naming how it would feel to never need to arrive, to identifying the specific people and moments that remind you that you are already wealthy in many ways.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 78 journal prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to pause the forward motion and take stock of the wealth already present, without minimising what remains to build.

content.text: A four-prompt journal set from Day 78 of a 12-week money programme. Day 78 opens Week 12 with the theme of living abundance as a normal, daily experience. The prompts move from naming the wealth already surrounding you, toward the question of how life changes when there is no arrival point to wait for. Set a timer. Write without editing.
New to journal prompts as a practice? Read
When you look around your life right now, what wealth already surrounds you?
Write the list. Not just money. Include the freedom, the choices, the things that are already paid for, the safety already in place.
How can you celebrate the abundance that is here without rushing toward the next goal?
Write what that would look like today. One specific thing you could do or notice or say to mark the wealth already here.
If you knew you never needed to arrive, how would you enjoy what already is?
Write what changes in a day that begins from enough rather than from almost. Be specific about the difference.
What specific moments, people, or things remind you today that you are already wealthy in many ways?
Name three. Write one sentence each. Let them be ordinary.
Adapted from the Day 78 journal prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
